title: Flodesk vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Flodesk and Constant Contact: pricing, features, and ratings to find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
h1: Flodesk vs Constant Contact: Detailed Comparison
intro: Both Flodesk and Constant Contact are established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Flodesk prioritizes design and visual appeal with flat-rate pricing, while Constant Contact offers broader marketing features at a lower entry price. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize beautiful email design or comprehensive marketing tools.
choose_a_if: You prioritize beautiful, visually stunning email designs and want to impress subscribers with premium templates
You have a growing list and want unlimited subscribers without worrying about scaling costs
You're a creative professional (designer, photographer, visual brand) who values design-first tools
choose_b_if: You need a budget-friendly entry point to email marketing starting at just $12/month
You want an all-in-one marketing platform with SMS, social media ads, and event management
You run a nonprofit or local business needing straightforward, practical marketing features

faq.q: Is Flodesk better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your priorities. Flodesk excels in email design with superior ratings (4.8 vs 4.0 on G2) and is ideal for visual brands. Constant Contact offers broader functionality and lower pricing, making it better for businesses needing a complete marketing suite. Neither is objectively 'better'—choose based on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Constant Contact is cheaper to start at $12/month versus Flodesk's $38/month. However, Flodesk's flat-rate pricing covers unlimited subscribers, while Constant Contact charges per-subscriber. For large lists, Flodesk may become more cost-effective, but for small lists, Constant Contact is the budget winner.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms allow you to export your contact lists. Both Flodesk and Constant Contact support standard email list formats. You'll need to recreate your email templates and workflows in the new platform, but your subscriber data transfers cleanly. Plan for some setup time during the migration.
